sentences.sentence: James Paul Gee, professor of education at the University of Wisconsin-Madison, played his first video game years ago when his six-year-old son Sam was playing Pajama Sam: No Need to Hide When It's Dark Outside.
sentences.translation: 多年前，威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校教育学教授詹姆斯·保罗·吉第一次玩电子游戏，当时他六岁的儿子萨姆正在玩《睡衣萨姆：天黑了也不用躲》。

structure.text: professor of education at the University of Wisconsin-Madison
when his six-year-old son Sam was playing Pajama Sam: No Need to Hide When It's Dark Outside

difficult_points: professor... 是 James Paul Gee 的同位语，补充其身份。
when 引导时间从句；冒号后的 No Need... 是游戏标题的一部分，其中 When It's Dark Outside 也是标题内的时间从句。

sentences.sentence: He wanted to play the game so he could support Sam's problem solving.
sentences.translation: 他想亲自玩这款游戏，以便帮助萨姆解决问题。

structure.text: so he could support Sam's problem solving

difficult_points: He 指 James Paul Gee；so 引出他玩游戏的目的。
Sam's problem solving 是名词短语，指萨姆解决游戏问题的过程和能力。

sentences.sentence: Though Pajama Sam is not an "educational game", it is replete with the types of problems psychologists study when they study thinking and learning.
sentences.translation: 尽管《睡衣萨姆》并不是一款“教育游戏”，它却充满了心理学家研究思维与学习时所关注的各类问题。

structure.text: Though Pajama Sam is not an "educational game"
the types of problems psychologists study
when they study thinking and learning

difficult_points: Though 引导让步从句；it 回指 Pajama Sam 这款游戏。
problems 后省略关系词 that，psychologists study 修饰 problems。
when 从句说明心理学家在研究思维与学习时会研究这类问题。

sentences.sentence: When he saw how well the game held Sam's attention, he wondered what sort of beast a more mature video game might be.
sentences.translation: 看到这款游戏如此牢牢吸引萨姆的注意力后，他开始思考面向更成熟玩家的电子游戏究竟会是什么样。

structure.text: When he saw how well the game held Sam's attention
how well the game held Sam's attention
what sort of beast a more mature video game might be

difficult_points: how well 从句作 saw 的宾语，表示游戏吸引注意力的程度。
what sort of beast... 是 wondered 的宾语从句，使用陈述语序；beast 是比喻，意为会是什么性质的东西。

expressions.meaning_zh: 吸引并保持某人的注意力

sentences.sentence: Video and computer games, like many other popular, entertaining and addicting kid's activities, are looked down upon by many parents as time-wasters, and worse, parents think that these games rot the brain.
sentences.translation: 电子游戏和电脑游戏同许多其他流行、有趣且容易上瘾的儿童活动一样，被许多家长轻视为浪费时间的东西；更糟的是，家长认为这些游戏会损害大脑。

structure.text: like many other popular, entertaining and addicting kid's activities
and worse, parents think that these games rot the brain
that these games rot the brain

difficult_points: like... 是插入比较，主语仍是 Video and computer games。
look down upon... as... 表示家长把游戏轻视为浪费时间的活动。
and worse 引出更强的负面看法；that 从句作 think 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: Violent video games are readily blamed by the media and some experts as the reason why some youth become violent or commit extreme anti-social behavior.
sentences.translation: 媒体和一些专家很容易把暴力电子游戏归咎为部分青少年变得暴力或实施极端反社会行为的原因。

structure.text: by the media and some experts
why some youth become violent or commit extreme anti-social behavior

difficult_points: are blamed as 表示游戏被认定为原因；readily 暗示这种归因过于轻易。
why 引导定语从句修饰 the reason；become violent 与 commit... 是并列谓语。

sentences.sentence: Recent content analyses of video games show that as many as 89% of games contain some violent content, but there is no form of aggressive content for 70% of popular games.
sentences.translation: 近期对电子游戏内容的分析显示，多达89%的游戏含有某种暴力内容，但70%的热门游戏并不包含攻击性内容。

structure.text: Recent content analyses of video games
that as many as 89% of games contain some violent content
but there is no form of aggressive content for 70% of popular games

difficult_points: that 从句作 show 的宾语；as many as 强调89%的比例很高。
but 后是存在句，源文数据表述存在张力：前半说89%含某种暴力，后半说70%无攻击性内容，可能区分 violent 与 aggressive。

sentences.sentence: Many scientists and psychologists, like James Paul Gee, find that video games actually have many benefits –the main one being making kids smart.
sentences.translation: 包括詹姆斯·保罗·吉在内的许多科学家和心理学家发现，电子游戏其实有不少益处，其中最主要的是让孩子变得更聪明。

structure.text: that video games actually have many benefits
the main one being making kids smart

difficult_points: like James Paul Gee 举例说明科学家和心理学家群体。
破折号后是独立主格结构，the main one 指 many benefits 中最主要的一项。
源文破折号后缺少空格（`–the`）；being making 虽显笨拙，语义是主要益处在于让孩子更聪明。

sentences.sentence: Video games may actually teach kids high-level thinking skills that they will need in the future.
sentences.translation: 电子游戏实际上可能培养孩子未来所需的高阶思维能力。

structure.text: that they will need in the future

difficult_points: teach kids skills 是双宾语结构；may 表示可能性而非确定结论。
that 修饰 high-level thinking skills，并在从句中作 need 的宾语；they 指 kids。

sentences.sentence: "Video games change your brain," according to University of Wisconsin psychologist Shawn Green.
sentences.translation: 威斯康星大学心理学家肖恩·格林指出：“电子游戏会改变你的大脑。”

structure.text: according to University of Wisconsin psychologist Shawn Green

difficult_points: 引语本身是完整主谓宾结构，according to 短语说明观点来源。
University of Wisconsin psychologist 是 Shawn Green 的身份说明。

sentences.sentence: Video games change the brain's physical structure the same way as do learning to read, playing the piano, or navigating using a map.
sentences.translation: 电子游戏改变大脑生理结构的方式，与学习阅读、弹钢琴或借助地图导航相同。

structure.text: the same way as do learning to read, playing the piano, or navigating using a map

difficult_points: the same way as... 构成方式比较；as 后出现倒装 do learning..., 用来避免重复 change the brain's structure。
learning、playing 和 navigating 是三个并列动名词活动；using a map 修饰 navigating。

sentences.sentence: Much like exercise can build muscle, the powerful combination of concentration and rewarding surges of neurotransmitters like dopamine, which strengthens neural circuits, can build the player's brain.
sentences.translation: 就像锻炼能够增强肌肉一样，专注与多巴胺等神经递质带来的奖励性激增相结合，也能强化玩家的大脑，而多巴胺会增强神经回路。

structure.text: Much like exercise can build muscle
the powerful combination of concentration and rewarding surges of neurotransmitters like dopamine

difficult_points: Much like 引导类比，说明大脑训练类似肌肉锻炼。
主语中心词是 combination，of 后连接 concentration 与 surges 两项。
which 紧接 dopamine，按源文单数 strengthens 理解为多巴胺增强神经回路。

sentences.sentence: Video games give your child's brain a real workout.
sentences.translation: 电子游戏能让孩子的大脑得到真正的锻炼。
difficult_points: give A B 是双宾语结构，your child's brain 是接受者。
workout 原指身体锻炼，此处比喻游戏对大脑的高强度训练。

sentences.sentence: In many video games, the skills required to win involve abstract and high level thinking.
sentences.translation: 在许多电子游戏中，获胜所需的技能涉及抽象思维和高阶思维。
difficult_points: required to win 是过去分词短语，修饰 skills，to win 说明所需技能的目的。
abstract 和 high level 并列修饰 thinking。

sentences.sentence: These skills are not even taught at school.
sentences.translation: 这些技能甚至不会在学校教授。
difficult_points: These skills 回指抽象和高阶思维技能。
are taught 是被动语态；not even 强调学校教育甚至没有覆盖这些能力。

sentences.sentence: Some of the mental skills trained by video games include: following instructions, problem solving, logic, hand-eye coordination, fine motor and spatial skills.
sentences.translation: 电子游戏训练的部分心智能力包括：遵循指令、解决问题、逻辑思维、手眼协调、精细动作能力和空间能力。

structure.text: following instructions, problem solving, logic, hand-eye coordination, fine motor and spatial skills

difficult_points: trained by... 是过去分词短语，修饰 mental skills。
冒号后列举多个并列能力；fine 同时修饰 motor skills，spatial 修饰 skills。

sentences.sentence: Research also suggests that people can learn iconic, spatial, and visual attention skills from video games.
sentences.translation: 研究还表明，人们可以通过电子游戏获得图像识别、空间认知和视觉注意方面的技能。

structure.text: that people can learn iconic, spatial, and visual attention skills from video games

difficult_points: that 从句作 suggests 的宾语；can 表示研究显示的能力可能。
iconic、spatial 和 visual attention 并列修饰 skills，from video games 表示学习来源。

sentences.sentence: There have been even studies with adults showing that experience with video games is related to better surgical skills.
sentences.translation: 甚至已有针对成年人的研究显示，电子游戏经验与更好的外科技能有关。

structure.text: showing that experience with video games is related to better surgical skills
that experience with video games is related to better surgical skills

difficult_points: There have been 是现在完成时存在句，说明已有此类研究。
showing... 修饰 studies；that 从句作 showing 的宾语。
be related to 表示相关关系，不单凭此句证明因果。

expressions.meaning_zh: 以成年人为对象的研究

sentences.sentence: Jacob Benjamin, doctor from Beth Israel Medical Center NY, found a direct link between skill at video gaming and skill at keyhole or laparoscopic surgery.
sentences.translation: 纽约贝斯以色列医疗中心的医生雅各布·本杰明发现，电子游戏技能与微创或腹腔镜手术技能之间存在直接联系。

structure.text: doctor from Beth Israel Medical Center NY
a direct link between skill at video gaming and skill at keyhole or laparoscopic surgery

difficult_points: doctor... 是 Jacob Benjamin 的同位语，补充其职业和机构。
between... and... 连接游戏技能与手术技能；keyhole surgery 是微创手术的通俗说法。

sentences.sentence: Also, a reason given by experts as to why fighter pilots of today are more skillful is that this generation's pilots are being weaned on video games.
sentences.translation: 此外，专家对当今战斗机飞行员技术更娴熟给出的一项解释是，这一代飞行员从小便接触电子游戏。

structure.text: as to why fighter pilots of today are more skillful
that this generation's pilots are being weaned on video games

difficult_points: given by experts 修饰 a reason；as to why... 说明这个解释针对的问题。
that 从句作表语，给出专家所述原因。
be weaned on 原指断奶后靠某物成长，此处比喻这一代飞行员从小接触并熟悉电子游戏。

sentences.sentence: The players learn to manage resources that are limited, and decide the best use of resources, the same way as in real life.
sentences.translation: 玩家学会管理有限资源，并决定资源的最佳用途，这与现实生活中的做法相同。

structure.text: and decide the best use of resources
the same way as in real life

difficult_points: that 修饰 resources，说明资源数量有限。
manage 与 decide 是 players 的并列学习内容；the same way as... 将游戏决策与现实生活类比。

sentences.sentence: In strategy games, for instance, while developing a city, an unexpected surprise like an enemy might emerge.
sentences.translation: 例如在策略游戏中，玩家建设城市时，可能突然出现敌人之类的意外情况。

structure.text: an unexpected surprise like an enemy

difficult_points: while developing... 是省略主语的时间状语结构，逻辑执行者是玩家。
like an enemy 举例说明 unexpected surprise；might 表示随机事件的可能性。

sentences.sentence: This forces the player to be flexible and quickly change tactics.
sentences.translation: 这会迫使玩家灵活应变并迅速改变策略。

structure.text: to be flexible and quickly change tactics

difficult_points: This 回指上一句敌人等意外情况突然出现。
force + 宾语 + to do 表示迫使玩家行动；be flexible 和 change tactics 是并列不定式内容。

sentences.sentence: Sometimes the player does this almost every second of the game giving the brain a real workout.
sentences.translation: 有时玩家几乎在游戏的每一秒都要这样应变，从而让大脑得到真正的锻炼。

structure.text: almost every second of the game
giving the brain a real workout

difficult_points: does this 中 this 代替灵活应变并改变策略这一行为。
giving... 是现在分词结果状语，说明高频决策对大脑产生的训练效果。

sentences.sentence: According to researchers at the University of Rochester, led by Daphne Bavelier, a cognitive scientist, games simulating stressful events such as those found in battle or action games could be a training tool for real-world situations.
sentences.translation: 由认知科学家达芙妮·巴维利耶带领的罗切斯特大学研究人员认为，模拟战斗或动作游戏中压力事件的游戏，可以成为训练人们应对现实情境的工具。

structure.text: According to researchers at the University of Rochester
simulating stressful events such as those found in battle or action games
a training tool for real-world situations

difficult_points: led by... 修饰 researchers；a cognitive scientist 是 Daphne Bavelier 的同位语。
simulating... 修饰 games；those 代替 stressful events，found... 再修饰 those。
could be 表示研究者提出的潜在用途，而非已确定的效果。

sentences.sentence: The study suggests that playing action video games primes the brain to make quick decisions.
sentences.translation: 该研究表明，玩动作电子游戏能让大脑预先进入快速决策状态。

structure.text: that playing action video games primes the brain to make quick decisions

difficult_points: that 从句作 suggests 的宾语；playing... 是从句中的动名词主语。
prime A to do 表示让大脑做好做某事的准备，而非简单的“教会”。

sentences.sentence: Video games can be used to train soldiers and surgeons, according to the study.
sentences.translation: 该研究认为，电子游戏可用于训练士兵和外科医生。
difficult_points: can be used 是情态动词加被动语态，表示潜在应用。
to train... 是目的状语；according to the study 限定观点来源。

sentences.sentence: Steven Johnson, author of
sentences.translation: 史蒂文·约翰逊，《……》一书的作者（书名接下段）。
difficult_points: 源文在段落边界处拆开了作者身份和书名，本片段需与下一段开头的书名连读。
author of 是未完成的同位语，说明 Steven Johnson 的身份，尚缺介词 of 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: Everything Bad is Good For You: How Today's Popular Culture, says gamers must deal with immediate problems while keeping their long-term goals on their horizon.
sentences.translation: （接上段）《一切坏事皆有益：当今流行文化如何……》一书作者指出，玩家必须一边处理眼前问题，一边始终把长期目标放在视野中。

structure.text: Everything Bad is Good For You: How Today's Popular Culture
gamers must deal with immediate problems while keeping their long-term goals on their horizon
while keeping their long-term goals on their horizon

difficult_points: 本段开头是上一段 author of 后被拆开的书名，且标题在源文中似乎不完整；解析原样保留。
从语义看 says 的主语应是跨段的 Steven Johnson，而不是书名。
while keeping... 表示玩家处理即时问题的同时仍关注长期目标。

expressions.text: keep long-term goals on the horizon

sentences.sentence: Young gamers force themselves to read to get instructions, follow storylines of games, and get information from the game texts.
sentences.translation: 年轻玩家会迫使自己阅读，以获取指令、跟进游戏故事线，并从游戏文本中获取信息。

structure.text: to get instructions, follow storylines of games, and get information from the game texts

difficult_points: force oneself to do 表示主动要求自己做某事。
第二个 to 引出阅读的目的，get、follow 和 get 是三个并列动作，后两项省略 to。

sentences.sentence: James Paul Gee, professor of education at the University of Wisconsin-Madison, says that playing a video game is similar to working through a science problem Like students in a laboratory, gamers must come up with a hypothesis.
sentences.translation: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校教育学教授詹姆斯·保罗·吉说，玩电子游戏类似于逐步解决一个科学问题；像实验室里的学生一样，玩家必须提出假设。

structure.text: professor of education at the University of Wisconsin-Madison
that playing a video game is similar to working through a science problem
gamers must come up with a hypothesis

difficult_points: 源文在 problem 与 Like 之间缺少句号或其他标点，因此两句合为一个分析单元并原样保留。
playing... 是 that 从句的动名词主语；be similar to 后接动名词 working。
Like... 作比较状语；come up with a hypothesis 表示提出可检验的假设。

sentences.sentence: For example, players in some games constantly try out combinations of weapons and powers to use to defeat an enemy.
sentences.translation: 例如，某些游戏中的玩家会不断试验武器和能力的组合，用它们击败敌人。

structure.text: to use to defeat an enemy

difficult_points: try out 表示通过实际尝试来测试组合。
第一个 to use 修饰 combinations，第二个 to defeat 表示使用这些组合的目的。

sentences.sentence: If one does not work, they change hypothesis and try the next one.
sentences.translation: 如果某个假设行不通，他们就会更换假设并尝试下一个。
difficult_points: If 从句中的 one 可指一种武器能力组合或一个假设；does not work 表示无效。
they 指 players；the next one 用 one 代替下一个 hypothesis 或 combination。

sentences.sentence: Video games are goal-driven experiences, says Gee, which are fundamental to learning.
sentences.translation: 吉说，电子游戏是由目标驱动的体验，而这种体验是学习的基础。
difficult_points: says Gee 是插入的倒装报道语，不影响主句结构。
which 语义上指 goal-driven experiences，说明目标驱动体验对学习的重要性。

sentences.sentence: Also, using math skills is important to win in many games that involve quantitative analysis like managing resources.
sentences.translation: 此外，在许多涉及资源管理等定量分析的游戏中，运用数学技能对获胜很重要。

structure.text: important to win in many games
that involve quantitative analysis like managing resources

difficult_points: using math skills 是动名词短语作主语；to win 表示数学技能的重要目标。
that 修饰 games；like managing resources 举例说明 quantitative analysis。

sentences.sentence: In higher levels of a game, players usually fail the first time around, but they keep on trying until they succeed and move on to the next level.
sentences.translation: 在游戏较高关卡中，玩家第一次通常会失败，但会继续尝试，直到成功并进入下一关。

structure.text: In higher levels of a game
until they succeed and move on to the next level

difficult_points: the first time around 表示第一次尝试时；but 对比首次失败和持续尝试。
keep on 后接动名词 trying；until 从句中的 succeed 和 move on 是并列谓语。

expressions.text: move on to the next level

sentences.sentence: Many games are played online and involve cooperation with other online players in order to win.
sentences.translation: 许多游戏在线进行，需要与其他在线玩家合作才能获胜。
difficult_points: are played 和 involve 是共用主语的并列谓语，前者被动、后者主动。
in order to win 表示玩家合作的目的。

sentences.sentence: Video and computer games also help children gain self-confidence and many games are based on history, city building, and governance and so on.
sentences.translation: 电子游戏和电脑游戏还能帮助儿童建立自信，而且许多游戏以历史、城市建设、治理等为题材。

structure.text: and many games are based on history, city building, and governance and so on

difficult_points: help + 宾语 + 动词原形表示帮助儿童获得自信。
and 后是新主语 many games；be based on 表示游戏内容以这些主题为基础。

sentences.sentence: Such games indirectly teach children about aspects of life on earth.
sentences.translation: 这类游戏会间接让儿童了解地球生活的不同方面。

structure.text: about aspects of life on earth

difficult_points: Such games 回指以历史、城市建设和治理为主题的游戏。
teach someone about... 表示让某人了解某一领域，indirectly 强调学习并非显性课程。

sentences.sentence: In an upcoming study in the journal Current Biology, authors Daphne Bavelier, Alexandre Pouget, and C. Shawn Green report that video games could provide a potent training regimen for speeding up reactions in many types of real-life situations.
sentences.translation: 在即将发表于《当代生物学》期刊的一项研究中，作者达芙妮·巴维利耶、亚历山大·普热和C.肖恩·格林报告称，电子游戏可能提供一套强效训练方案，加快人们在多种现实情境中的反应速度。

structure.text: In an upcoming study in the journal Current Biology
authors Daphne Bavelier, Alexandre Pouget, and C. Shawn Green
that video games could provide a potent training regimen for speeding up reactions in many types of real-life situations

difficult_points: upcoming 修饰 study，表示研究即将发表；三个人名与 authors 构成同位关系。
that 从句作 report 的宾语；for speeding up... 说明训练方案的用途。

sentences.sentence: The researchers tested dozens of 18- to 25-year-olds who were not ordinarily video game players.
sentences.translation: 研究人员测试了数十名18至25岁的年轻人，他们平时并不玩电子游戏。

structure.text: who were not ordinarily video game players

difficult_points: 18- to 25-year-olds 是年龄范围的名词化表达，指18至25岁的人。
who 修饰这些参与者；ordinarily 表示他们在日常情况下不是游戏玩家。

sentences.sentence: They split the subjects into two groups.
sentences.translation: 他们把受试者分成两组。
difficult_points: They 指研究人员；subjects 在实验语境中指受试者，不是学科。
split A into B 表示把一个整体分成若干组。

sentences.sentence: One group played 50 hours of the fast-paced action video games "Call of Duty 2"and "Unreal Tournament," and the other group played 50 hours of the slow-moving strategy game "The Sims 2."
sentences.translation: 一组玩了50小时快节奏动作游戏《使命召唤2》和《虚幻竞技场》，另一组则玩了50小时节奏较慢的策略游戏《模拟人生2》。

structure.text: 50 hours of the fast-paced action video games "Call of Duty 2"and "Unreal Tournament,"
and the other group played 50 hours of the slow-moving strategy game "The Sims 2."

difficult_points: One group 与 the other group 构成两组对比，and 连接两项实验处理。
fast-paced 与 slow-moving 对比游戏节奏；源文在 `2"and` 之间缺少空格，已原样保留。

sentences.sentence: After this training period, all of the subjects were asked to make quick decisions in several tasks designed by the researchers.
sentences.translation: 训练期结束后，所有受试者都被要求在研究人员设计的多项任务中快速作出决定。
difficult_points: were asked to do 是被动结构，表示实验要求。
designed by... 是过去分词短语，修饰 tasks，而不是 subjects。

sentences.sentence: The action game players were up to 25 percent faster at coming to a conclusion and answered just as many questions correctly as their strategy game playing peers.
sentences.translation: 动作游戏组得出结论的速度最高快了25%，而且正确回答的问题数量与策略游戏组的同龄受试者一样多。

structure.text: just as many questions correctly as their strategy game playing peers

difficult_points: up to 25 percent faster 表示速度提升最高达25%；at 后接动名词 coming。
were 和 answered 是共用主语的并列谓语。
as many questions... as... 是数量同级比较，说明速度提高没有以正确率下降为代价。
